name: Australian Finance Group Ltd
analysis: AFG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 40% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.6850, stop A$1.5642, target A$1.8900 (1.70:1) — then trail it.
